query:
SELECT 
  ts.id,
  ts.clientId,
  c.name as client_name,
  c.email,
  ts.sessionType,
  ts.sessionDate,
  ts.startTime,
  ts.cancelled,
  ts.lastReminderSentAt,
  CASE 
    WHEN ts.lastReminderSentAt IS NULL THEN 'NO REMINDER'
    WHEN DATE(ts.lastReminderSentAt) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 'REMINDER YESTERDAY'
    ELSE 'REMINDER ON OTHER DATE'
  END as reminder_status
FROM training_sessions ts
JOIN clients c ON ts.clientId = c.id
WHERE ts.sessionDate = CURDATE()
  AND ts.cancelled = 0
ORDER BY ts.startTime ASC;

  END as reminder_status
FROM training_sessions ts
JOIN clients c ON ts.clientId = c.id
WHERE ts.sessionDate = CURDATE()
  AND ts.cancelled = 0
ORDER BY ts.startTime ASC;
